body:
at the moment, the reduction of stencil size for `LeftConnected` and `RightConnected` topologies was not in place, and we did not capture this in tests because we do not use higher order methods in distributed tests where this error would pop up. 

This PR fixes the bug and updates the tests to include high order advection on a bounded domain so that we are sure the model does what is intended

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

labels.description: Our plan for total cluster domination
labels.name: distributed 🕸️

title: Bugfix for advection on distributed topologies

body: Might speed things up a bit
